calendar.description: Senate Transportation, Public Utilities, Energy, and Technology Hearing

general_provisions: This bill amends vehicle registration fees to provide funding for Motor Vehicle Division services in counties of the third through sixth class.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>provides funding for counties that provide Motor Vehicle Division services on behalf of the division;<hr><ltbullet>modifies vehicle registration fees;<hr><ltbullet>creates the Vehicle Registration Services Restricted Account;<hr><ltbullet>increases the required contribution for the historical black license plate from $25 to $50;<hr><ltbullet>allocates special group license plate revenue from the historical black license plate; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
